creator: bruno@ruomad.net
text:
Hello,

Thanks for the feedback.

I suppose we could try to bump source to 0.9.9, but there has been a lot of changes since 0.9.2, especially support for OQS. 
I've been trying to have the code compile on FreeBSD 14.0 but I'm not there yet. Did you try it ?

Anyway I could try to cook up a version of 0.9.9 with disabled OQS, it compiles with two trivial patches (as my previous patches have been integrated upstream), but I have to test that it runs OK, esp that the ocsp server builds and runs.
